narrative:
Precinct Huntington South (precinct in Ross County) has 732 registered voters, with 66.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
